{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219304547964C5A5E2F112819CC"}"},"total":2777},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7484075048820245272","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追评，读到最新一章了，爽，是真的爽，无限流小说，是和《神秘空间》不一样的爽，后面每一卷都有爆点，尤其是目前的现实剧情。真的很好看！
还是有一些段落描写我想讨论，虽然作者目前一次也没回我，但还是好看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742522944,"group_id":"7316511686989450302","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"77507126771"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316511686989450302","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"856"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1012,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":92028,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":29},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7475740097177535256","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一本挺不错的无限流，有幸在推荐上发现他，明明一开始只是因为封面看着不错才进来的，
现在已经看到第四个副本了，作者写的确实不错，虽然没有到我肚子里的蛔虫一样合胃口，但是看着确实不错了，严格来说我也不好定义我的胃口到底是什么，但是我是真喜欢篇章后面的总结，要的就是这种打破第四面墙的感觉，
虽然读的过程中也会发现一些我觉得奇怪的情节，有一起读的应该会看见我写的段评，以及，虽然看到一些书友觉得副本设计的简单，但是我倒是没读出来主角很游刃有余的感觉
总结，确实不错，值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740586353,"group_id":"7316511686989450302","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"庸才都渴望自己的观点被多数人认可，以享受身处聚光灯下的错觉。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8N04OnNUUfFVrENOQTAr54=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4cbb6fa4e7e84fe28d0c34bf88fd4114~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708477&x-signature=QSIblin6%2BwLZ%2BoMficKHumHobOE%3D","user_id":"77507126771","user_name":"戴面具的仔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"77507126771","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705123449,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316511686989450302","book_info":{"abstract":"【姓名：高异】
【已装备标签（1/1）：记者lv2（普通）】
【未装备标签：负债者lv1（普通），失恋者lv1（普通），好人lv1（普通），网络冲浪职业选手lv1（普通），老年妇女之友lv2（稀有）】
被幸运女神诅咒的高异，在人生中最倒霉的阶段获得了“标签系统”。
这让他在突如其来的副本时代，变得如鱼得水。
“把上个副本获得的特性，和现在的标签合成一下.......”
高异小手一抖。
【特性：欺骗（普通）】+【称号：负债者（普通）】=【称号：老赖（稀有）】
【特性：迷雾（稀有）】+【称号：记者（普通）】=【称号：调查员（史诗）】
于是，高异朝着拥有更多、更强标签的目标，迈出了第一步。
......
“那个玩家究竟为什么这么强，他是怎么做到的？”
“肯定是通关了无数噩梦级的副本，打赢了无数史诗级的战役。”
......
“其实也不难，主要是记得清一下每日任务。”
高.【传奇调查员】【赛博精神病】【无面人】【鬼神境赌徒】【英雄】【冷血杀人狂】【意念黑客】【官方战略合作伙伴】【老年妇女之友】.异听到了他们的疑问，如是回答道。
......

电影等题材来创作，就很喜欢这点，每个副本的结尾都有总结，嘿嘿可爱捏(*σ´∀`)σ，期待作者大大继续创作出优秀的故事，也祝本书越来越好！(｡>∀<｡)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720874582,"group_id":"7316511686989450302","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"少爷好久没有听完一本书了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/ceEQWN2kY3UN0VlymakYGDDB99glIsdtiLlkf+dn2J","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/35c6a2b8985347fbbc8b914d27f79167~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710183&x-signature=jvATcNf57Frc1WznFPFqzMKNPUw%3D","user_id":"3693971208937352","user_name":"冬焉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3693971208937352","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316511686989450302","book_info":{"abstract":"【姓名：高异】

在我眼中这本书更像是披着系统主神空间皮的科幻奇幻的正义侦探的推理小说故事，也是这点吸引了我，继续保持[赞]
当然问题也是有的，浅尝辄止的战斗场景，几近于无的男女关系，这些都是可以加强的，不过瑕不掩瑜，希望作者再接再厉，加油！","text_exts":[{"e":86,"s":82,"text":"主神空间","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%BB%E7%A5%9E%E7%A9%BA%E9%97%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774179045112819CC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227385383721945793305%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227316511686989450302%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%BB%E7%A5%9E%E7%A9%BA%E9%97%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719546768,"group_id":"7316511686989450302","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6G3oE8EoZmTtmJB4FO+zKc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"101799671839","user_name":"用户名31304935"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101799671839","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316511686989450302","book_info":{"abstract":"【姓名：高异】
